name: Mahatma Gandhi
contributions: Led India's independence movement through nonviolent civil disobedience. Pioneer of Satyagraha — resistance through mass nonviolent protest.
quote: Be the change that you wish to see in the world.

name: Bhagat Singh
contributions: A charismatic Indian revolutionary who became a hero of the independence movement. His martyrdom at 23 inspired generations.
quote: They may kill me, but they cannot kill my ideas.

name: Subhas Chandra Bose
contributions: Indian nationalist whose defiant patriotism made him a hero. Founded the Indian National Army (Azad Hind Fauj) to fight for independence.
quote: Give me blood and I will give you freedom!

name: Sardar Vallabhbhai Patel
contributions: Played a leading role in the country's struggle for independence and guided its integration into a united, independent nation. Known as the Iron Man of India.
quote: Faith is of no evil in absence of strength. Faith and strength, both are essential to accomplish any great work.

name: Rani Lakshmibai
contributions: One of the leading figures of the Indian Rebellion of 1857 and became a symbol of resistance to the British Raj. She fought valiantly for the freedom of Jhansi.
quote: I shall not surrender my Jhansi.

name: Chandrashekhar Azad
contributions: A fearless revolutionary who reorganized the Hindustan Republican Association. He vowed to never be captured alive by the British and kept his oath till his last breath.
quote: If yet your blood does not rage, then it is water that flows in your veins.

name: Mangal Pandey
contributions: An Indian soldier who played a key role in events immediately preceding the Indian Rebellion of 1857. His courageous act of defiance against British officers sparked the First War of Independence.
quote: The time has come to fight. Rise up against the oppressors.

name: Sarojini Naidu
contributions: Known as the Nightingale of India, she was a poet and political activist. She became the first woman president of the Indian National Congress and the first woman governor of an Indian state.
quote: We want deeper sincerity of motive, a greater courage in speech and earnestness in action.

name: Bal Gangadhar Tilak
contributions: One of the first leaders of the independence movement, he is known as the Father of Indian Unrest. He championed the cause of Swaraj (self-rule) and awakened nationalist consciousness.
quote: Swaraj is my birthright and I shall have it!

name: Lala Lajpat Rai
contributions: Known as the Lion of Punjab, he was a fierce critic of British rule. He led the protest against the Simon Commission and was fatally injured during the lathi charge in Lahore.
quote: The blows struck at me today will be the last nails in the coffin of British rule in India.

name: Tantia Tope
contributions: A general in the Indian Rebellion of 1857 and a close associate of Nana Sahib and Rani Lakshmibai. He led guerrilla warfare against the British and became a legendary figure of resistance.

name: Shivaram Rajguru
contributions: A revolutionary who, along with Bhagat Singh and Sukhdev, was hanged for the assassination of British police officer J.P. Saunders in retaliation for the death of Lala Lajpat Rai.
quote: Our sacrifice will not go in vain. India will be free.
